records.pInfo:
Lower one enemy’s physical defense by 25%,
then attack five times with 0.6 times the power
of a conventional attack. For the duration of the
music, all allies’ hit count is raised by 20%.

*The upper limit for hit count is 200%.
This effect stacks with hit count increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Deal double the damage of a conventional attack
to all enemies. For the duration of the music, all
allies’ physical attack power is raised by 35%.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with physical attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy with wind for six times the
damage of a conventional attack. For the
duration of the music, all allies’ physical attack
is raised by 50%.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with physical attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack all enemies for 1.5 times the damage of a
conventional attack. For the duration of the
music, all allies’ physical defense is raised by
20%.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.
This effect stacks with physical defense increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy five times with 0.8 times the
power of a conventional attack. For the duration
of the music, all allies’ hit count is raised by 35%.

*The upper limit for hit count is 200%.
This effect stacks with hit count increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy with earth for six times the
damage of a conventional attack. For the
duration of the music, all allies’ physical
defense is raised by 50%.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.
This effect stacks with physical defense increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy for three times the damage of
a conventional attack. For the duration of the
music, all allies’ critical rate is raised by 300%.

*The upper limit for critical rate is 1,000%.
This effect stacks with critical-rate increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy six times with 0.6 times the
power of a conventional attack and a high
chance of inflicting paralysis. For the duration
of the music, all allies’ physical attack is raised
by 35%.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with physical attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack all enemies with fire for five times the
damage of a conventional attack. For the
duration of the music, all allies’ physical attack
is raised by 50%.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with physical attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy for 3 times the damage of a
conventional attack, ignoring the target’s
physical defense. For the duration of the music,
all allies’ magic attack is raised by 20%.

*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with magic attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Lower all enemies’ physical and magic attack
and defense by 15% for four turns. For the
duration of the music, all allies’ magic attack
is raised by 35%.

*The lower limit for physical defense and magic defense is 75%.
*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with magic attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack all enemies for five times the damage of
a conventional attack, dealing additional damage
to demonkind foes. For the duration of the
music, all allies’ magic attack is raised by 50%.

*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with magic attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Heal all allies by a massive amount. For the
duration of the music, the effect of healing
magic is amplified by 100%.

*The upper limit for healing magic is 200%.

Raise physical and magic attack and defense of
all allies by 25% for four turns. For the duration
of the music, all allies’ speed is raised by 35%.

*The upper limit for physical attack, magic attack,
physical defense, magic defense, and speed is
150%. This effect stacks with physical attack,
magic attack, physical defense, magic defense,
and speed increases from special moves, but
not with increases from other sources.

Attack one enemy for seven times the damage of
a conventional attack, dealing additional damage
to undead foes. For the duration of the music, all
allies’ magic attack is raised by 50%.

*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.
This effect stacks with magic attack increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy five times with 0.7 times the

20%.

*The upper limit for hit count is 200%.
This effect stacks with hit count increases
from special moves, but not with increases
from other sources.

Attack one enemy fifteen times with 0.3 times
the power of a conventional attack. For the
duration of the music, all allies’ hit count is

*The upper limit for hit count is 200%.
This effect stacks with hit count increases

This effect stacks with hit count increases
